---
applyTo:
  - "**/*"
---

# Windows Environment Instructions

## Environment
- OS: Windows only.
- Shell: PowerShell only (`pwsh.exe`).
- Paths: Windows style (`C:\...`).
- Scripts: `.ps1`.
- CLI: `dotnet`.

## Command rules
- Use PowerShell syntax.
- Use single-line commands when possible.
- Use Windows path separators.
- Avoid bash-specific syntax.

## File rules
- Keep script examples in `.ps1`.
- Keep commands runnable in Visual Studio terminal.
